title: Passive Recon Checklist
when_to_use: At the start of every engagement before any active scanning

steps.title: WHOIS Lookup
steps.instruction: WHOIS lookup on target domain (whois target.com)
steps.tip: Note registrar, creation date, expiry, and nameservers. Privacy-protected WHOIS still reveals registrar info

steps.title: DNS Enumeration
steps.instruction: DNS enumeration: dig target.com ANY, MX, NS, TXT records
steps.tip: TXT records often contain SPF, DKIM, and verification strings that reveal services in use

steps.title: Google Dorking
steps.instruction: Google dorking: site:target.com filetype:pdf, site:target.com inurl:admin
steps.tip: Try multiple dork combinations. Check cached versions for recently removed content

steps.title: LinkedIn Enumeration
steps.instruction: LinkedIn employee enumeration: search company name, note roles
steps.tip: Focus on IT, security, and executive roles. Note email patterns from profiles

steps.title: Shodan Search
steps.instruction: Shodan search for target IP range
steps.tip: Shodan free tier is limited but still useful. Check for exposed services, banners, and certificates

steps.title: Breach Check
steps.instruction: Check Have I Been Pwned for domain email breaches
steps.tip: A breached email means credentials may be available. Note which breaches and their dates

steps.title: Document Everything
steps.instruction: Screenshot and document every finding with timestamps
steps.tip: Timestamps prove when you found information — essential for legal protection and report accuracy
